title: Infested│寄生
description: Silverfish will infest targets that are not already infected.│蠹蟲會寄生尚未被寄生的目標。
body:
# Function│功能
- Silverfish will infest a target that does not have the Infected effect, applying the Infected effect to the target for 60 seconds and clearing itself.│蠹蟲會寄生不具有寄生效果的目標，對目標施加持續60秒的寄生效果並清除自身。

The datapack achieves this effect via a custom enchantment called "infested", so if you see an enchanted book with the "frozen_armor" enchantment in your Creative Inventory, please ignore it.│該資料包透過名為"infested"的自訂附魔來實現此效果，因此如果您在創造模式物品欄中看到帶有"frozen_armor"附魔的附魔書，請忽略它。
